sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114185" key="xlohfagi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χλοη-φᾰγία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114185.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating of grass,</tr_> ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:289" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">289</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
